title: Design System: Tatarverse
summary: Bilingual cultural-center catalog with a controlled homepage brand layer and a quiet monochrome catalog layer.

layers.name: Brand layer
layers.purpose: Homepage identity moments: liquid-metal mark, heavy uppercase hero title, limited blue accent, compact animated stats, and search screenshot imagery.

layers.name: Catalog layer
layers.purpose: Centers list, detail pages, MDX content, filters, search, navigation, translation surfaces, and source-backed factual content.

rules: Use the blue accent as a homepage signal, not a general palette.
Use real interface imagery when explaining product behavior.
Preserve locale routes, source links, stable slugs, and factual copy.
Respect reduced motion for every animated component.

background.usage: Page background and default clean plane.

foreground.usage: Primary text, high hierarchy, strong links, and active catalog states.

muted.usage: Low-emphasis surfaces, chips, and catalog cards.

surface.usage: Cards, menus, MDX surfaces, controls, and screenshot blocks.

border.usage: Borders, separators, and quiet content framing.

primary.usage: Primary actions, active filters, focus rings, and strongest text.

brandBlue.usage: Homepage hero word treatment only unless a later design pass explicitly expands it.

depth.usage: Rings, tonal hierarchy, inset lines, metadata, and quiet separation.

display.purpose: Heavy uppercase homepage hero lines only.

headline.purpose: Major page titles and high-level catalog surfaces.

body.purpose: Readable factual content, MDX prose, center summaries, and supporting copy.

label.purpose: Compact controls, chips, metadata, stats labels, and navigation.

shadows.name: soft-surface-lift
shadows.purpose: Quiet separation for cards, controls, MDX panels, and menu surfaces.

motion.name: hero-accent-flow
motion.purpose: Slow homepage accent movement on the highlighted hero word.

motion.name: stats-focus
motion.purpose: Short focus and count animation for catalog scale stats.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Small hover, focus, and active-state feedback.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Animated components must provide a reduced-motion path.

components.name: Liquid-Metal Mark
components.description: Compact homepage identity object. It stays decorative, centered, and separate from catalog component language.

components.name: Hero Title
components.description: Heavy uppercase localized hero lines with one limited blue accent phrase and quieter secondary lines.
components.html: Catalog phrase
components.css: .hero-title { font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: -0.04em; line-height: 1; text-wrap: balance; } .hero-title__accent { color: #2563eb; }

components.name: Catalog Stats
components.description: Three compact stat pills with icons, tabular numbers, muted labels, and a brief focus animation.
components.html:
128
Centers
components.css: .stats-focus__item { border-radius: 16px; background: var(--color-surface); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-depth-100) 60%, transparent); }

components.name: Search Screenshot Section
components.description: Localized product-image section using real search screenshots beside concise explanatory copy.
components.html:
Search title

Search copy
components.css: .search-feature { overflow: hidden; border-radius: 24px; background: var(--color-surface); box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgb(228 228 231); }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Compact primary action for clear navigation or active commands.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border: 0; border-radius: 16px; background: var(--color-primary, #1d1d1d); color: var(--color-primary-foreground, #ffffff); padding: 8px 16px; font: 500 14px/1.25 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-primary, #1d1d1d); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Quiet navigation action used in header and mobile menu links.
components.css: .ds-button-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border: 0; border-radius: 16px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-primary, #1d1d1d); padding: 8px 16px; font: 500 14px/1.25 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-button-ghost:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #1d1d1d) 5%, transparent); } .ds-button-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-primary, #1d1d1d); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Compact filter control with a clear active state.
components.css: .ds-filter-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; max-width: 100%; border: 0; border-radius: 16px; background: var(--color-muted, #f0f0f0); color: var(--color-muted-foreground, #6b6b6b); padding: 6px 10px; font: 500 14px/1.25 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-filter-chip[data-active='true'] { background: var(--color-primary, #1d1d1d); color: var(--color-primary-foreground, #ffffff); }

components.name: Search Field
components.description: Primary catalog search field with soft ring and visible focus.
components.css: .ds-search input { width: 100%; border: 0; border-radius: 16px; background: var(--color-surface, #ffffff); color: var(--color-surface-foreground, #1d1d1d); padding: 12px 16px; font: 400 14px/1.25 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--color-depth-100, #e6e6e6); outline: none; } .ds-search input::placeholder { color: var(--color-subtle-foreground, #8f8f8f); } .ds-search input:focus { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #1d1d1d) 25%, transparent); }

components.name: Center Card
components.description: Signature catalog list item for center pages. It keeps title, type, category, location, and summary readable in a quiet neutral surface.
components.css: .ds-center-card { overflow: hidden; border-radius: 32px; background: var(--color-muted, #f0f0f0); color: var(--color-surface-foreground, #1d1d1d); padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-depth-100, #e6e6e6) 40%, transparent); } .ds-center-card h3 { overflow-wrap: anywhere; color: var(--color-surface-foreground, #1d1d1d); font: 700 16px/1.375 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.015em; }

components.name: MDX Surface
components.description: Readable factual prose surface with typography tokens, restrained border, and quiet lift.
components.html: <article class="prose rounded-2xl border border-border-muted bg-surface p-8 shadow-2xs ring ring-depth-100/40">Content</article>

narrative.overview: Tatarverse pairs a memorable homepage identity with a quiet, practical catalog. The homepage may use the liquid-metal mark, heavy uppercase hero type, limited blue accent, compact animated stats, and real interface imagery. Catalog surfaces remain monochrome, factual, and easy to scan.
keyCharacteristics: Two-layer system: homepage brand layer plus catalog utility layer.
Monochrome semantic tokens for most interface structure.
Blue accent limited to the homepage hero signal.
Squircle geometry for controls, cards, stats, menus, and catalog primitives.
Real product imagery in the homepage search section.
Motion limited to identity, stats emphasis, and small control feedback.

rules.name: Monochrome Carries Structure
rules.body: Default to semantic neutral tokens for layout, controls, content, and catalog surfaces.

rules.name: Blue Is A Signal
rules.body: Blue belongs to the homepage identity accent and selected brand moments only.

rules.name: Display Is Scarce
rules.body: Heavy uppercase display type is for homepage identity and rare page-level statements.

rules.name: Cards Are Functional
rules.body: Use cards for center records, posts, MDX surfaces, and real grouped data.

rules.name: Motion Must Have A Reason
rules.body: Motion is allowed for identity, stats emphasis, and small state feedback, with reduced-motion support.

dos: Reuse src/styles/tailwind.css tokens before adding visual roles.
Keep the homepage brand layer distinct from catalog utility surfaces.
Use real product imagery where it clarifies a feature.
Preserve source-backed content, locale routes, stable slugs, and metadata behavior.
Verify contrast for muted labels, placeholders, metadata, and small controls.
Keep reduced-motion behavior in every animated component.
donts: Do not turn the whole site blue.
Do not add extra cultural palettes or ornamental motifs.
Do not add glossy SaaS gradients, glass panels, side stripes, or generic icon-card grids.
Do not reuse homepage display treatment inside dense catalog surfaces.
Do not add decorative motion to MDX pages, lists, or center detail content.
Do not rewrite factual copy into slogans.
